title: Property Consultant - Embassy Office Parks REIT - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Embassy Office Parks REIT - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
